unchanged: A unchanged region has no difference between two temporal satellite images.
A unchanged area shows consistent land cover without any variation.
The unchanged region remains the same in shape, texture and color over time.

changed: A changed region has obvious differences between two temporal satellite images.
A changed area shows obvious land cover variation and object changes.
